name: Atar Allecha (Spiced Green-Pea Puree)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup green split peas, covered with water for 1 hour,
cooked for 1/2 hour, drained and mashed
1 small hot green chili, chopped (2 to 3 teaspoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a dry pan over moderately low heat. Stir-fry the onion and garlic for 2 minutes.
2. Add the mashed peas, turmeric, salt, and chili; mix well. Add the water and cook for 3 to 4 minutes until reduced to a thick, green, well-spiced puree. Serve warm with injera.
